heading: Penalties
label: 1827 Penalties
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , with exception for certain physical searches approved by the Attorney General to gather foreign intelligence information, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 14, 1994section 807(c) of Pub. L. 103–359section 1821 of this title

children.text: under color of law for the purpose of obtaining foreign intelligence information, executes a physical search within the United States except as authorized by statute; or

discloses or uses information obtained under color of law by physical search within the United States, knowing or having reason to know that the information was obtained through physical search not authorized by statute, for the purpose of obtaining intelligence information.

children.heading: Defense
children.label: b Defense
children.text: It is a defense to a prosecution under subsection (a) that the defendant was a law enforcement or investigative officer engaged in the course of his official duties and the physical search was authorized by and conducted pursuant to a search warrant or court order of a court of competent jurisdiction.

children.heading: Fine or imprisonment
children.label: c Fine or imprisonment
children.text: An offense described in this section is punishable by a fine of not more than $10,000 or imprisonment for not more than five years, or both.

children.heading: Federal jurisdiction
children.label: d Federal jurisdiction
children.text: There is Federal jurisdiction over an offense under this section if the person committing the offense was an officer or employee of the United States at the time the offense was committed.
